strategies.name: Ivy A split
strategies.description: Pressure A from main and ivy.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 A main 2 ivy, smoke ebox + connector -> go A

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane

strategies.name: Fast A main
strategies.description: Hit outer quickly through main.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: group A main, smoke ebox, flash out -> go A

notes: works best with strong first man

strategies.name: Popdog split A
strategies.description: Use popdog with outer pressure.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 pop, 3 A main, smoke connector -> go A

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane
notes: pop players must not be seen early

strategies.name: Upper B hit
strategies.description: Commit into upper B with site utility.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: upper B, smoke connector + lower ramp, flash in -> go B

strategies.name: Lower B split
strategies.description: Combine upper and ramp timing into B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 upper, 2 lower ramp, smoke connector -> go B

goodWhen: good if 2 players can take the second lane
notes: one player should watch ladder flank

strategies.name: Fake ivy to B
strategies.description: Show ivy pressure then rotate into B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show show ivy -> rotate upper B

meta.purpose: pull rotation before the real hit
goodWhen: good if the team will rotate together
notes: do not die on ivy fake

strategies.name: Ladder to pop A
strategies.description: Use ladder and pop pressure into outer.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take ladder, 2 pop, 3 A main, smoke ebox -> go A

strategies.name: Silent ivy crunch
strategies.description: Walk ivy and hit outer with low noise.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: walk ivy walk, then swing A, smoke ebox -> go A

goodWhen: good if the team can stay quiet
notes: works best with small main presence

strategies.name: Delayed pop A
strategies.description: Wait around popdog timing and hit outer after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide pop till 1:00, 3 A main + 2 pop, smoke connector -> go A

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing

strategies.name: Fast ivy lane A
strategies.description: Take ivy fast and flow into outer.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: fast ivy 3, then 2 A main, smoke ebox + connector -> go A

strategies.name: Main to ladder lurk A
strategies.description: Use ladder timing to help an outer hit.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 4 A main, 1 ladder lurk, smoke ebox -> go A

notes: simple outer core with one wrinkle

strategies.name: Upper hold then B
strategies.description: Wait in upper and burst B on a late cue.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide upper till 1:00, upper + lower ramp, smoke connector -> go B

goodWhen: good if the team will wait for the timing

strategies.name: Standard outer-inner
strategies.description: Balanced Train setup.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 A 2 B

strategies.name: Ivy push
strategies.description: Take ivy aggressively for early info.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: push ivy early

meta.purpose: get early info and fall back if needed
goodWhen: good if one teammate can trade
good if you have flash support

strategies.name: Popdog control
strategies.description: Fight for popdog early.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: popdog control

strategies.name: Inner hold
strategies.description: Stable two-player inner defense.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 B inner hold

strategies.name: A stack outer
strategies.description: Gamble more players on outer.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: stack A outer

strategies.name: B retake
strategies.description: Delay inner and retake with support.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: retake B inner

meta.purpose: save utility for the B retake
goodWhen: good if the team will save utility

strategies.name: Connector rotate focus
strategies.description: Keep connector ready to support both sites.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: connector control

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Economy-focused compact defense.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: save crossfire

meta.purpose: protect weapons and avoid isolated duels
goodWhen: good if the team will not overpeek

strategies.name: Main anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop fast A main hits.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A main anti-rush ebox + site

strategies.name: Ladder info
strategies.description: Take info around ladder and popdog lanes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: ladder info

notes: do not overpeek into held angles

strategies.name: Ivy anchor outer
strategies.description: Play deeper ivy while outer holds main lanes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: ivy hold + outer crossfire

notes: do not leave ivy unsupported too long

strategies.name: Upper anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare for fast upper pressure.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: upper anti-rush

notes: one player slows, one anchors trade
